title: Senior Investment Banker at Canara Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Canara Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Canara Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Canara Bank:
Canara Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank!
